ddls:
CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "show_number" INTEGER /* The number assigned to the show */,
  "air_date" TEXT /* The date the episode aired */,
  "season_number" INTEGER /* Season number of the episode */,
  "season_episode_number" INTEGER /* Episode number in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "round_name" TEXT /* Name of the round (e.g., Jeopardy!, Double Jeopardy!, Final Jeopardy!) */,
  "round_description" TEXT /* Short description of the round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., DR. SEUSS AT THE MULTIPLEX, MY PLACE?) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Short description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode where the question was asked */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the round in which the question was asked */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the question */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Monetary value of the question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* The actual question text */,
  "audio_clip" TEXT /* URL to the audio clip associated with the question */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image associated with the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "answers" (
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each answer */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding question */,
  "answer_text" TEXT /* The text of the answer */,
  "explanation" TEXT /* Explanation of the answer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("answer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_answers_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the question that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "old_value" INTEGER /* The old value before the change */,
  "new_value" INTEGER /* The new value after the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "changed_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_history_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_history_changed_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the question was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the question used */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode where the question was used */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the round where the question was used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the question was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_usage_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_usage_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_usage_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_success" (
  "success_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each success record */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the question */,
  "correct_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the question was correctly answered */,
  "incorrect_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the question was incorrectly answered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("success_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_success_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_categories" (
  "question_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question-category relationship */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the question */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_categories_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_rounds" (
  "episode_round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode-round relationship */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_rounds_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_rounds_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_difficulty" (
  "difficulty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each difficulty record */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the question */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the question (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("difficulty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_difficulty_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the question */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_tags_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)
